bash_commands: echo "---DOCKER---" && ls -la Dockerfile* docker-compose* 2>/dev/null; echo "---DEPLOY CONFIGS---" && ls -la fly.toml render.yaml vercel.json netlify.toml nexlayer* 2>/dev/null; echo "---ENV---" && ls...
cat docker-compose.yml; echo "===DOCKERIGNORE==="; cat .dockerignore; echo "===MAKEFILE==="; cat Makefile
echo "===BACKEND==="; ls -la backend; echo "===FRONTEND==="; ls -la frontend

echo "===BACKEND DOCKERFILE==="; cat backend/Dockerfile; echo; echo "===FRONTEND DOCKERFILE==="; cat frontend/Dockerfile; echo; echo "===FRONTEND .dockerignore==="; cat frontend/.dockerignore; echo; e...

echo "===VITE CONFIG==="; cat frontend/vite.config.ts; echo; echo "===FRONTEND PKG==="; cat frontend/package.json; echo "===API URL USAGE==="; grep -rn "VITE_API_URL\|import.meta.env\|localhost:8000\|...

echo "===ENTRYPOINT==="; cat backend/scripts/docker-entrypoint.sh; echo; echo "===APP DIR==="; ls backend/app; echo "===CONFIG==="; find backend/app -name "config*.py" -o -name "settings*.py" | head; ...
echo "===MAIN==="; sed -n '1,80p' backend/app/main.py; echo "===DB.py==="; cat backend/app/db.py

echo "===STORAGE SERVICE==="; sed -n '1,70p' backend/app/services/storage_service.py; echo "===CORS / ENV reads==="; grep -rn "os.getenv\|os.environ\|getenv\|CORS_ORIGINS\|allow_origins" backend/app/m...
echo "===main.py routers + app creation==="; sed -n '80,200p' backend/app/main.py

echo "===route prefixes==="; grep -rn "APIRouter(" backend/app/api/routes/*.py | head -40; echo "===frontend client.ts==="; cat frontend/src/api/client.ts | head -30; echo "===lib/api.ts==="; sed -n '...
